news.t: Clean Energy Stocks and ETFs Rise on Climate Optimism After Elections

holdings.infoBox: CNRG is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 6.31%, SolarEdge Technologies at 4.44%, Applied Materials at 3.79%, Generac Holdings at 3.78%, and Enphase Energy at 3.72%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Kensho Clean Power ETF (CNRG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Kensho Clean Power index. The fund tracks a tier-weighted index of US equities associated with the clean power sector. CNRG was launched on Oct 22, 2018 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Clean Energy Stocks and ETFs Rise on Climate Optimism After Elections
data.text: Investors are optimistic Democrats will retain one house of Congress and implement President Joe Biden's clean-energy initiatives.
